description: Design System compartido de MD Consultoría TI para CuentosIA, Palabras Vivas, dashboards y landing pages

stack.components: shadcn/ui (20) + custom (17) + layout (2) + dashboard (8) + landing (5) + responsive (5) + video (6) + template-iphone (12) + template-zentry (10) + template-macbook (6) + template-saas (7)
stack.video: Remotion v4.0.438 (6 compositions + VideoPlayer + /video skill + BrandSplash)

knownIssues.description: Node 25 causa SyntaxError en Next.js 15 builds. Usar Node 22 LTS.
Tailwind v4 @theme inline no funciona en CSS importado por layouts. @layer utilities pierde especificidad vs globals.css.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar clases CSS explícitas fuera de @layer, scoped bajo .template-name.

knownIssues.description: Safari bloquea .play() indirecto. loadedData.length checks fallan.
globals.css h1-h6 font-size vars override Tailwind utilities.
knownIssues.workaround: Usar p tags o CSS layers para headings que necesiten Tailwind sizing.

knownIssues.description: src/lint/rules/no-inline-styles.ts y require-aria-label.ts tienen @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any — bloquean npm run build.
knownIssues.workaround: Pre-existing issue. Fix: añadir // eslint-disable-next-line comments o tipar correctamente.

auditorCiudadano.changes: Full Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui migration, 8 extracted components, BrandSplash on citizen + admin, Vercel build config fixed
auditorCiudadano.note: citizen-app-ruddy.vercel.app is STALE — correct citizen URL is auditor-ciudadano.vercel.app. Admin requires manual deploy: cd admin-app && npx vercel --prod
